top.name: Avatar of Elements
top.rules_text: Transform: gain 7 armor and for 3 turns all your spells imbue their target tile with a random element AND deal +3 damage. You leave elemental terrain on every tile you walk across.

channel.name: Avatar of Elements (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Duration is 5 turns and you also gain +2 speed

bottom.name: Maelstrom
bottom.rules_text: Create a 3-tile radius storm centered on target point. Every turn it rotates dealing 2 damage and pushing all enemies 1 tile clockwise. Imbues all tiles it touches with Storm. Lasts 3 turns.

channel.name: Maelstrom (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Radius is 4 and it also freezes enemies hit
